description_long: This is a modern, minimalist desk lamp with a rectangular base and a slim, elongated arm that supports a flat, horizontal light bar. The lamp features a touch-sensitive power button on the base, indicated by a circular icon. The arm is connected to the base and the light bar with visible blue pivot joints, suggesting adjustable articulation for directing light. The lamp is predominantly black with subtle blue accents at the joints, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. Its compact form factor and clean lines make it suitable for urban workspaces, home offices, or study areas. The overall design emphasizes functionality and simplicity, with no ornate or decorative embellishments.
description: A sleek, black modern desk lamp with a rectangular base, adjustable arm, and flat light bar, accented by blue pivot joints and a touch power button.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the lamp, highlighting the rectangular base, vertical arm, and horizontal light bar with visible blue pivot joints.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the lamp, the touch power button on the base, and the alignment of the arm and light bar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the same profile and blue pivot joints from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the back of the lamp, the rectangular base, and the structure of the supporting arm.
